channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
item.description: 待翻译：SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: google-labs-code/design.md
item.description: 待翻译：A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

item.title: commaai/openpilot
item.description: 待翻译：openpilot is an operating system for robotics. Currently, it upgrades the driver assistance system on 300+ supported cars.

item.title: grafana/grafana
item.description: 待翻译：The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.
item.category: 数据库, 可观测性, 可视化

item.title: ripienaar/free-for-dev
item.description: 待翻译：A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

item.title: opendatalab/MinerU
item.description: 待翻译：Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.
item.category: AI代理, 模型/LLM, 自动化

item.title: alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
item.description: 待翻译：张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

item.title: mauriceboe/TREK
item.description: 待翻译：A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

item.title: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
item.description: 待翻译：AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

item.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
item.description: 待翻译：World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

item.title: aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws
item.description: 待翻译：Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS
item.category: AI代理, skills, 编辑器插件

item.title: NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
item.description: 待翻译：小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫

item.title: garrytan/gstack
item.description: 待翻译：Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

item.title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
item.description: 待翻译：CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

item.title: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
item.description: 待翻译：Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

item.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
item.description: 待翻译：Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

item.title: GitHub 热门日报 · 17 个项目
item.description: GitHub 热门日报 · 17 个项目
